seo.title: Arlecchino Build Guide — GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Arlecchino build guide for Genshin Impact v4.8. Best weapons ranked (Crimson Moon's Semblance, White Tassel), optimal artifacts (Fragment of Harmonic Whimsy, Gladiator's Finale), team compositions, and rotation guide.

tldr_weapon: Crimson Moon's Semblance (F2P: White Tassel R5)
intro: Arlecchino is a top-tier on-field Pyro DPS who scales uniquely with her Bond of Life mechanic. She cannot be healed by allies — instead, her burst is her only source of recovery. This guide covers everything you need to master the Knave in v4.8.

weapons.name: Crimson Moon's Semblance
weapons.notes: Signature. Grants BoL on hit. +DMG% when BoL above 30%. Tailor-made.

weapons.name: White Tassel R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. +48% NA DMG. Incredible for a 3-star. Free from Liyue chests.

weapons.name: Staff of Homa
weapons.notes: Universal stat stick. HP→ATK conversion. Strong alternative if you have it.

weapons.name: Primordial Jade Winged-Spear
weapons.notes: Stacking ATK% buff. High base ATK. Solid all-rounder from standard banner.

weapons.name: Deathmatch R5
weapons.notes: Battle Pass weapon. High CRIT Rate makes building easy. Good stat stick.

artifact_why: Tailor-made for Arlecchino. Grants 18% ATK (2pc). When Bond of Life fluctuates, gain up to 54% DMG bonus (4pc). This set was released alongside her and is mathematically her ceiling.

main_stats.sands_note: Always ATK%. She does not need ER nearly as much as Raiden. HP% is wasted — she cannot be healed.
main_stats.goblet_note: Pyro DMG is optimal. ATK% goblet is a viable placeholder but aim for Pyro.
main_stats.circlet_note: Aim for 1:2 CRIT ratio. ~80% CR, ~180%+ CD. CRIT Rate is especially valuable since she has zero CRIT ascension.

sub_priority: CRIT Rate / CRIT DMG (1:2 ratio, aim 80/180+)
Energy Recharge (nice to have, ~120% is comfortable)

teams.name: Team 1: Vape Arlecchino
teams.desc: 👥 Her highest ceiling team. Yelan and/or Xingqiu provide off-field Hydro for consistent Vaporize. Kazuha groups enemies and shreds Pyro RES with VV. Bennett buffs ATK — yes, Bennett is fine even though he heals; his ATK buff far outweighs the anti-synergy. Arlecchino's self-sustain from burst is enough.

teams.name: Team 2: Mono Pyro
teams.desc: 👥 No reactions, just raw Pyro dominance. Xiangling provides off-field damage and Pyro resonance (+25% ATK). Kazuha shreds RES and groups. Bennett buffs both Arlecchino and Xiangling. Consistent, easy to play, less dependent on EM substats.

teams.name: Team 3: Overload (Chevreuse)
teams.desc: 👥 Overload comp enabled by Chevreuse. Fischl provides off-field Electro for Overload triggers. Chevreuse shreds Pyro/Electro RES and provides ATK buff. Bennett rounds out the team. High single-target damage, excellent against bosses. NO HEALERS APART FROM BENNETT. Chevreuse's healing is minimal and optional — her buffs come from her passive, not healing.

rotation_code: Arlecchino E → Kazuha E Q (VV shred, grouping) → Yelan E Q → Bennett Q E → Kazuha E (reapply VV) → Arlecchino CA (absorb BoL) → N3D × 4-5 → Q (if needed) → Repeat
mistakes: ❌ ❌ Bringing a healer other than Bennett. Arlecchino's A1 passive prevents all ally healing in combat. Kokomi, Baizhu, Xianyun, etc. are dead slots. Bennett is only used for his ATK buff.
❌ ❌ Using Burst too early. Her Q clears all Bond of Life and heals. If you burst before consuming BoL with NAs, you lose your damage buff and waste uptime.
❌ ❌ Forgetting to absorb the mark. After using E, you must use a Charged Attack after ~5 seconds to absorb the Bond of Life. Without this, your NAs deal physical damage — almost zero.
❌ ❌ Not building enough CRIT Rate. Arlecchino has no innate CRIT from ascension (she gets CRIT DMG). Without a CRIT Rate weapon or circlet, you will struggle to reach 70%+ CRIT Rate.
❌ ❌ Running a shielder instead of offensive support. Zhongli is comfortable but significantly lowers her damage ceiling. Kazuha or Sucrose provide far more team DPS. Learn to dodge.
